HOLLOW CREEK
Moonshine
APPLE PIE
SPIRTIS DISTILLED FROM GRAIN, SUGAR &
LEMON JUICE WITH NATURAL FLAVORS ADDED
35% ALC./VOL. (70 PROOF)
750 ML
